_description: Known referring provider database. Used in M1E for NPI validation, credential verification, and provider recognition. Populated from processed referrals over time. New providers flagged with FLAG_NEW_PROVIDER and added after verification.
_used_by: M1E (Provider & Chart Notes), NPI validation cascade
_source: Visual Tree v0.19.0 M1E, Codified Logic Tree v0.16.5 Stage 1.5
_population_notes: This file starts mostly empty and grows as referrals are processed. Each verified provider gets an entry. The system learns known providers over time, reducing manual NPI lookups.

schema.credentials: string -- MD, DO, NP, PA, etc.
schema.fax: string -- fax number for return communications
schema.known_name_variants: array -- alternate spellings/formats seen in OCR
schema.supervising_physician_npi: string -- if mid-level, link to supervising MD/DO NPI
schema.referral_count: integer -- number of referrals processed from this provider
schema.last_referral_date: string -- ISO date of most recent referral
schema.verified: boolean -- true if NPI confirmed against NPPES registry
schema.notes: string -- any special notes about this provider

_placeholder._note: Replace this with actual provider entries as they are verified. Example entry below.

lookup_logic._description: How the system uses this databank during M1E processing.

by_npi.step: If NPI extracted from document, look up here first.
by_npi.match: If found AND name matches (fuzzy) -> NPI verified, no flag.
by_npi.mismatch: If found BUT name differs -> FLAG_NPI_NAME_MISMATCH.
by_npi.not_found: If not in databank -> cascade to NPPES registry API.

by_name.step: If NPI not extracted, search by provider name.
by_name.match: If found -> use stored NPI. Flag if multiple matches.
by_name.not_found: Cascade to NPPES registry API by name + state.

new_provider.step: If provider not found anywhere after full cascade.
new_provider.action: FLAG_NEW_PROVIDER -- process continues, provider added to databank queue.
new_provider.queue: After human verifies NPI, add entry to this file.

maintenance.auto_add: When a new provider is verified (NPI confirmed), add entry automatically.
maintenance.variant_learning: When OCR produces a new spelling variant for a known provider, add to known_name_variants.
maintenance.stale_check: Providers with no referrals in 2+ years can be flagged for review.
maintenance.nppes_refresh: Periodically re-verify NPI numbers against NPPES registry (quarterly recommended).
